description: London for men from playboy is inspired by the staid and beautiful city of London. Top notes are mandarin, galbanum and pink grapefruit with a heart of rose, cinnamon and Toscanol molecule. The base has notes of cedar, tonka and Pisco brandy.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
